summary: Update mode testing complete for Admin Dashboard collapsible groups feature. All 4 dashboard groups (Team Management, Payroll & Payments, Forms & Communications, Operations & Reports) work correctly. Expand/collapse functionality verified. Existing tests updated to accommodate the new grouped structure.

notes: Minor: data-testid 'messages-section' is duplicated - appears in both AdminDashboard.jsx wrapper and MessagesSection component. Tests use .first() to handle this.

details.dashboard-groups.spec.ts: 14/14 tests passed (new spec for collapsible groups)
details.refactored-modals.spec.ts: 12/12 tests passed (updated for new group structure)
details.updates-tab.spec.ts: 9/9 tests passed (updated to expand Forms & Communications group first)

all_4_groups_visible.description: All 4 dashboard groups (Team Management, Payroll & Payments, Forms & Communications, Operations & Reports) are visible and have correct titles and badges

team_management_default_open.description: Team Management group is expanded by default showing All Employees and Hours by Employee sections

expand_collapse_functionality.description: Each group can be clicked to expand/collapse. Multiple groups can be expanded simultaneously.

payroll_payments_group.description: Payroll & Payments group expands to show Payroll Summary with Current Pay Period, This Month, This Year totals, and Payment Records section

forms_communications_group.description: Forms & Communications group expands to show Messages and Form Submissions sections

operations_reports_group.description: Operations & Reports group expands to show Mileage Log and Reports sections

all_features_accessible.description: All existing functionality remains accessible within the new grouped structure

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard groups refactoring verified. 4 collapsible groups (Team Management, Payroll & Payments, Forms & Communications, Operations & Reports) all working correctly. Team Management opens by default. When testing sections inside collapsed groups, remember to expand the parent group first using data-testid='group-{name}-toggle' where name is team/payroll/forms/operations.
